title: presence_status_get: use None instead of explicit serde_json::Value::Null for ids
description: presence_status_get (misc.rs:59) passes "ids": serde_json::Value::Null explicitly, while all other /get methods pass ids as Option<&[&str]>. The explicit Null makes a reader wonder why this method differs from its siblings. Fix: use None::<&[&str]> (serializes identically to Value::Null) so the calling convention matches chat_get, message_get, read_position_get, and chat_contact_get.
